sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I can see the center cell turned gray! The click toggled the center cell from green to gray. Now I can see the grid has:
- All cells green EXCEPT the center which is now gray
- The target pattern has 4 purple dots in a cross (no center)
So the goal is to match the pattern: 4 green cells where the purple dots are (cross pattern without center), and 5 gray cells (4 corners + center).
Currently the grid has:
- 8 green cells + 1 gray center
I need to click the 4 corner cells to turn them gray too. The corners are:
- Top-left: [49,24]
- Top-right: [49,34]
- Bottom-left: [59,24]
- Bottom-right: [59,34]
Let me click all 4 corners to complete the pattern.
